source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And he is my little brother George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: She is Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: He is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: daan1 ce1
cards.english: [Bicycle]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 tin1 long5 hei3 cing1
cards.english: It's a beautiful, clear day today.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: tung4 hai2 dou6 caai2 daan1 ce1 wo3
cards.english: Peppa and George are riding their bikes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 呢個南瓜真係好靚啊，爹哋
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 naam4 gwaa1 zan1 hai6 hou2 leng3 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: This pumpkin is so beautiful, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬先生對佢嘅南瓜覺得非常自豪
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 deoi3 keoi5 ge3 naam4 gwaa1 gok3 dak1 fei1 soeng4 zi6 hou4
cards.english: Mr. Pig is very proud of his pumpkin.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 南瓜係我唯一種到嘅嘢
cards.jyutping: naam4 gwaa1 hai6 ngo5 wai4 jat1 zung2 dou3 ge3 je5
cards.english: Pumpkins are the only things I can grow

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 可能係因為我鍾意南瓜批啩
cards.jyutping: ho2 nang4 hai6 jan1 wai6 ngo5 zung1 ji3 naam4 gwaa1 pai1 gwaa3
cards.english: Maybe it's because I like pumpkin pie

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: faai3 di1 laa1
cards.english: Hurry up, George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa同佢嘅朋友Danny Suzy同埋Rebecca喺度踩緊單車
cards.jyutping: tung4 keoi5 ge3 pang4 jau5 tung4 maai4 hai2 dou6 caai2 gan2 daan1 ce1
cards.english: Peppa and her friends Danny, Suzy, and Rebecca are riding their bikes

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 zau6 caai2 gan2 keoi5 gaa3 saam1 leon4 ce1
cards.english: And George is riding his tricycle

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 caai2 dak1 taai3 maan6 laa3
cards.english: You're going too slow!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 鬥快踩去豬先生嘅南瓜度吖
cards.jyutping: dau3 faai3 caai2 heoi3 zyu1 sin1 saang1 ge3 naam4 gwaa1 dou6 aa1
cards.english: Let's race to Mr. Pig's pumpkin

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 如果鬥快踩去爹哋嘅南瓜度
cards.jyutping: jyu4 gwo2 dau3 faai3 caai2 heoi3 de1 dei6 ge3 naam4 gwaa1 dou6
cards.english: If we race to Daddy's pumpkin

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我哋就要小心千祈唔好撞到個南瓜啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zau6 jiu3 siu2 sam1 cin1 kei4 m4 hou2 zong6 dou3*2 go3 naam4 gwaa1 aa3
cards.english: We have to be careful not to bump into the pumpkin

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jyu4 gwo2 zong6 laan6 zo2 keoi5 ge3 waa2
cards.english: If we break it,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 wui6 hou2 soeng1 sam1 gaa4
cards.english: Daddy will be very sad.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1
cards.english: Don't worry, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: dau3 faai3 heoi3 laa1
cards.english: Race to it!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa同佢嘅朋友 鬥快踩去豬先生嘅南瓜度嘞
cards.jyutping: tung4 keoi5 ge3 pang4 jau5 dau3 faai3 caai2 heoi3 zyu1 sin1 saang1 ge3 naam4 gwaa1 dou6 laak3
cards.english: Peppa and her friends are racing to Mr. Pig's pumpkin.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: wai3 siu2 sam1 ngo5 go3 naam4 gwaa1 aa3
cards.english: Hey, be careful of my pumpkin!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: siu2 sam1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa, be careful!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jan1 zyu6 de1 dei6 ge3 naam4 gwaa1
cards.english: Watch out for Daddy's pumpkin!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, sorry.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 keoi5 caai2 dak1 gei2 maan6 aa1
cards.english: Look how slowly George is pedaling.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zung6 hai2 dou6 caai2 gan2 saam1 leon4 ce1 aa3
cards.english: George is still riding his tricycle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 其實你架車都係差唔多唧，Peppa
cards.jyutping: kei4 sat6 nei5 gaa3 ce1 dou1 hai6 caa1 m4 do1 zek1
cards.english: Actually, your bike is about the same, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 zung6 hai6 jung6 gan2 fu3 zo6 luk1 aa3
cards.english: You're still using training wheels.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我踩單車已經唔使用副助轆喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 caai2 daan1 ce1 ji5 ging1 m4 sai2 jung6 fu3 zo6 luk1 laa3
cards.english: I don't need training wheels when I ride my bike anymore.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 hai6 aa3
cards.english: Me neither!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zung6 jau5 ngo5
cards.english: Me too!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zoi3 caai2 soeng6 saan1 aa1
cards.english: Let's ride uphill again!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 jat1 cai4 maa1
cards.english: Do you want to come along, Peppa?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 laa3 ngo5 lau4 hai2 ne1 dou6 syun3 laa3
cards.english: No, I think I'll stay here.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jat1 zan6 gin3 aa1
cards.english: See you later.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1
cards.english: Okay.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa好希望佢部單車冇加到副助轆啊
cards.jyutping: hou2 hei1 mong6 keoi5 bou6 daan1 ce1 mou5 gaa1 dou3 fu3 zo6 luk1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa really hopes her bike doesn't have training wheels anymore.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爹哋，我架單車已經唔想再用副助轆喇
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 gaa3 daan1 ce1 ji5 ging1 m4 soeng2 zoi3 jung6 fu3 zo6 luk1 laa3
cards.english: Daddy, I don't want to use training wheels on my bike anymore.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: mou5 zo2 keoi5 nei5 zan1 hai6 caai2 dou3
cards.english: Can you really ride without them?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3
cards.english: Yes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1 gam2 ngo5 caak3 zau2 keoi5 laa1
cards.english: Alright, Peppa, then I'll take them off.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 豬先生拆走Peppa部單車上嘅副助轆
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 caak3 zau2 bou6 daan1 ce1 soeng5 ge3 fu3 zo6 luk1
cards.english: Mr. Pig removes the training wheels from Peppa's bike.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你真係唔用副助轆嚟踩單車呀？
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 m4 jung6 fu3 zo6 luk1 lai4 caai2 daan1 ce1 aa1
cards.english: Are you really not going to use training wheels to ride your bike?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3
cards.english: Yes!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 zi1 cin4 mei6 si3 gwo3 gam2 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: You've never tried it like this before.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zou6 dak1 dou3 gaa4
cards.english: I can do it!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: dak1 gaa4
cards.english: I can do it...!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jat1 di1 dou1 m4 hou2 siu3
cards.english: It's not funny at all!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 唔用副助轆踩單車一啲都唔簡單啊
cards.jyutping: m4 jung6 fu3 zo6 luk1 caai2 daan1 ce1 jat1 di1 dou1 m4 gaan2 daan1 aa3
cards.english: Riding a bike without training wheels is not easy at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 ngo5 bong1 sau2 maa1
cards.english: Do you want me to help you? Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa1 m4 goi1 de1 dei6
cards.english: Okay, please, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gam2 hou2 laa1
cards.english: Alright then.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zeon2 bei6 co5 hou2 ceot1 faat3
cards.english: Ready, sit tight, go!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 fong3 sau2 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Don't let go, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1 ngo5 wui6 zuk1 sat6 nei5 gaa4
cards.english: Don't worry, I'll hold on to you tight.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 zou6 dak1 hou2 hou2 aa3
cards.english: You're doing really well, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zuk1 sat6 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Hold on tight, Daddy!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: nei5 gai3 zuk6 caai2 laa1
cards.english: Keep pedaling.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: kaau3 zi6 gei2 caai2 daan1 ce1
cards.english: Peppa is riding her bike all by herself.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 ce2 mou5 jung6 fu3 zo6 luk1 tim1 aa3
cards.english: And without training wheels!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 nei5 zou6 me1 fong3 sau2 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, why did you let go?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你一路都係自己踩，我冇幫手啊
cards.jyutping: nei5 jat1 lou6 dou1 hai6 zi6 gei2 caai2 ngo5 mou5 bong1 sau2 aa3
cards.english: You've been riding all by yourself, I wasn't helping.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 ge2

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你頭先真係踩得好好啊
cards.jyutping: nei5 tau4 sin1 zan1 hai6 caai2 dak1 hou2 hou2 aa3
cards.english: You were really riding very well just now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 ge2

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 sik1 caai2 daan1 ce1 laa3
cards.english: I can ride a bike now!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 睇下我…我識踩單車喇，睇下
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 ngo5 ngo5 sik1 caai2 daan1 ce1 laa3 tai2 haa6
cards.english: Look at me... I can ride a bike now, look!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6
cards.english: Danny, Suzy, Rebecca! Look!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我唔使再用副助轆踩單車喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 sai2 zoi3 jung6 fu3 zo6 luk1 caai2 daan1 ce1 laa3
cards.english: I don't need training wheels to ride a bike anymore!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 ngo5 aa1
cards.english: Look at me!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Hooray!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 鬥快踩去爹哋嘅南瓜度吖
cards.jyutping: dau3 faai3 caai2 heoi3 de1 dei6 ge3 naam4 gwaa1 dou6 aa1
cards.english: Race you to Daddy's pumpkin!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: siu2 sam1 aa3 ngo5 go3 naam4 gwaa1
cards.english: Peppa! Be careful! My pumpkin!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zau6 lai4 jeng4 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: I'm about to win!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jyun4 cyun4 mou5 tai2 cin4 bin6 aa3
cards.english: Peppa isn't looking where she's going at all!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: aai1 bai6 laa3
cards.english: Oh no, this is bad

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Peppa磧爛咗豬先生個南瓜啊
cards.jyutping: cik1 laan6 zo2 zyu1 sin1 saang1 go3 naam4 gwaa1 aa3
cards.english: Peppa crushed Mr. Pig's pumpkin

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 對唔住啊，爹哋，我磧爛咗你個南瓜
cards.jyutping: deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3 de1 dei6 ngo5 cik1 laan6 zo2 nei5 go3 naam4 gwaa1
cards.english: Sorry Daddy, I crushed your pumpkin

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 lei5 go3 naam4 gwaa1 zyu6 laa3
cards.english: Never mind the pumpkin

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 最重要嘅係你平安冇事啊
cards.jyutping: zeoi3 zung6 jiu3 ge3 hai6 nei5 ping4 on1 mou5 si6 aa3
cards.english: The most important thing is that you're safe and sound

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 下次你踩單車一定要睇路啊，知嗎？
cards.jyutping: haa6 ci3 nei5 caai2 daan1 ce1 jat1 ding6 jiu3 tai2 lou6 aa3 zi1 maa1
cards.english: Next time you ride your bike, you must look where you're going, understand?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我應承你我一定會㗎喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jing1 sing4 nei5 ngo5 jat1 ding6 wui6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: I promise I will

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 gik6
cards.english: That's great

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 話時話吖，既然個南瓜已經爛咗
cards.jyutping: waa6 si4 waa6 aa1 gei3 jin4 go3 naam4 gwaa1 ji5 ging1 laan6 zo2
cards.english: Speaking of which, now that the pumpkin is already ruined

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我就將佢整成南瓜批啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zau6 zoeng1 keoi5 zing2 sing4 naam4 gwaa1 pai1 laa1
cards.english: I'll just turn it into a pumpkin pie

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hou2 zung1 ji3 sik6 naam4 gwaa1 pai1 gaa4
cards.english: I really like eating pumpkin pie!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 因為爹哋呢一個南瓜咁大個
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 de1 dei6 ne1 jat1 go3 naam4 gwaa1 gam3 daai6 go3
cards.english: Because Dad's pumpkin is so big,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 肯定個南瓜批絕對夠大家一齊食㗎喇
cards.jyutping: hang2 ding6 go3 naam4 gwaa1 pai1 zyut6 deoi3 gau3 daai6 gaa1 jat1 cai4 sik6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: there will definitely be enough pumpkin pie for everyone to eat together.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E12 Bicycles［單車］(Canto spoken subs)
